name: timeline-dependency-tracking
description: Monitor project timelines, track dependency chains, detect schedule risks, and auto-adjust projected dates
objectives: Track task dependencies and cascade delay impacts
Calculate critical path and identify schedule risks
Auto-adjust projected dates when predecessors slip
Alert on tasks approaching or exceeding deadlines
prerequisites: Tasks with dependencies and due dates exist

procedure.description: Build and validate the task dependency graph
commands: QUERY all tasks with their dependency relationships
BUILD directed acyclic graph (DAG) of dependencies
DETECT circular dependencies and flag errors
IDENTIFY orphan tasks (no dependencies, no dependents)
MAP external dependencies (other teams, third-party)
procedure.expectedOutput: Validated dependency graph with all relationships

procedure.description: Calculate critical path and schedule flexibility
commands: CALCULATE earliest start/finish for all tasks (forward pass)
CALCULATE latest start/finish for all tasks (backward pass)
IDENTIFY critical path (zero float tasks)
COMPUTE slack/float for non-critical tasks
HIGHLIGHT tasks where delay = project delay
procedure.expectedOutput: Critical path with float calculations per task

procedure.description: Identify tasks at risk of slipping
commands: CHECK tasks approaching due date with <50% completion
DETECT tasks already past due date
CALCULATE cascade impact of delayed tasks on dependents
COMPARE current velocity against required velocity
FLAG milestones at risk based on current progress

procedure.description: Recalculate projected dates based on actual progress
commands: RECALCULATE downstream due dates when predecessors slip
PROPOSE new dates maintaining dependency order
IDENTIFY where schedule compression is possible
SUGGEST tasks that can be fast-tracked or parallelized
GENERATE before/after timeline comparison
procedure.expectedOutput: Revised schedule with justification for changes

commands: CREATE timeline overview with milestones
INCLUDE on-track, at-risk, and off-track indicators
ADD schedule variance metrics (planned vs actual)
LIST upcoming deadlines in next 7/14/30 days
PROVIDE optimization recommendations
procedure.expectedOutput: Timeline health report with action items

criteria: Risk flags trigger before deadlines are missed

testScenarios.test: Delay a critical path task by 3 days
testScenarios.expected: All downstream dates auto-adjusted, PM alerted

testScenarios.test: Identify parallelizable tasks on a sequential schedule
testScenarios.expected: Recommendations to shorten timeline via parallelization

successIndicators: Schedule risks detected >5 days before deadline

commonErrors.solution: Identify cycle, recommend which dependency to remove

commonErrors.error: Tasks missing due dates or estimates
commonErrors.solution: Flag incomplete tasks, use defaults for projection

escalationCriteria: Critical path delay >1 week with no mitigation options
External dependency delayed with no alternative

successMetrics.name: Risk Detection Lead Time
successMetrics.measurement: Days between risk detection and actual deadline

agentInterfaces.message: Fetch tasks with dependencies and status for timeline analysis
Alert on schedule risks and deadline changes
